Con'T Prove-Up Hearing As To Deft Western Macarthur By Plaintiffs Darwin Smith & Marilyn Smith (Asbestos)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: ANNA COSTA, Esq. of Paul & Hanley, 510/559-9980 on behalf of plaintiff(s). No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff DARWIN SMITH and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $1,338,333.00 and judgment in favor of plaintiff MARILYN SMITH and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $551,250.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made. The Court took matter Under Submission as of Apr-03-2002 by ALFRED G. CHIANTELLI. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: M. TORREANO, #8600 (503)
